name: Apple Sausage Cheddar Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 link sausages, precooked and cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 Granny Smith apple, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear French bread into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cover the bottom of an ungreased quiche dish with bread pieces.
3. Add the sliced sausage and apple to the bread.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the bread, sausage, and apple.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
7. Cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
8. Makes 6 servings.
